title: Assertion failure in rel_bin.c:2274: rel2bin_project: Assertion `0' failed.
poc: CREATE TABLE t1(a INTEGER, b INTEGER, c INTEGER, d INTEGER, e INTEGER);
SELECT CASE WHEN c>(SELECT avg(c) FROM t1) THEN a*2 ELSE b*10 END FROM t1;
SELECT abs(b-c), CASE WHEN c>(SELECT avg(c) FROM t1) THEN a*2 ELSE b*10 END FROM t1;
SELECT CASE WHEN c>(SELECT avg(c) FROM t1) THEN a*2 ELSE b*10 END, abs(b-c) FROM t1;
key_bug_features: Assertion failure during complex CASE statement evaluation
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2(x INTEGER, y FLOAT, z VARCHAR(50), w DATE, v BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO t2(x, y, z, w, v) VALUES(1, 2.5, 'test', '2023-01-01', TRUE);
SELECT CASE WHEN y > (SELECT avg(y) FROM t2) THEN x * 3 ELSE CAST(z AS INTEGER) END FROM t2;
SELECT CASE WHEN z IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE LENGTH(z) END, CASE WHEN y < 0 THEN NULL ELSE y + 1 END FROM t2;
SELECT x, CASE WHEN y > (SELECT avg(y) FROM t2) THEN x * 3 ELSE CAST(z AS INTEGER) END, COALESCE(w, CURRENT_DATE) FROM t2;
